title: Zakkie's Smoorsnoek
excerpt: Ingredients 40 ml oil 4 onions, finely sliced 1 green pepper, diced 4 tomatoes, diced 4 cooked potatoes, diced 700 g cooked snoek, flaked and bones removed The grated peel of 1 lemon 100 ml fish stock (the kind you buy in packets, or …
html:
Ingredients

  • 40 ml oil
  • 4 onions, finely sliced
  • 1 green pepper, diced
  • 4 tomatoes, diced
  • 4 cooked potatoes, diced
  • 700 g cooked snoek, flaked and bones removed
  • The grated peel of 1 lemon
  • 100 ml fish stock (the kind you buy in packets, or the water you cooked the fish in)
  • salt and white pepper
  • the juice of 1 lemon

Method

Heat the oil in a pan and fry the onions and pepper until soft. Add the tomato and potatoes and fry together with the onions and pepper until the potatoes are cooked.

Add the flaked fish, lemon peel and fish stock and stir. Let it simmer for 15 minutes with a lid on.

Season to taste with the salt and white pepper and add the lemon juice. Simmer for a further 15 minutes.

Serves 4 portions with concertina sweet potatoes.

Easy!
